findings.field: TikTok · Security, first bullet and AWS Bedrock-related project bullets
findings.issue: In a security-context section, the resume mentions AWS Bedrock for NLP/LLM evaluation and summarization, but it does not explicitly state the data boundary. A reviewer may ask whether the work used synthetic, redacted, internal, or production/user data.
findings.fix: Add an explicit qualifier if accurate, such as 'internal evaluation on synthetic/redacted data' or 'no user/prod data involved', while keeping the Bedrock/NLP claim.

revision_priority: [SHOULD] Add an explicit data-boundary qualifier to the TikTok AWS Bedrock bullets so the Security-context use case is unambiguous.
